title: Squirrel Removal Morris Heights | Expert Wildlife Control Services
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal in Morris Heights, Bronx. Safe, humane extraction and prevention. Serving pre-war buildings and residential properties. Call for $900-$2,500 service.
intro: Morris Heights residents facing squirrel intrusions need fast, professional wildlife control solutions. Our expert squirrel removal services protect your home from damage caused by these persistent pests who often invade attics, walls, and crawl spaces throughout this historic Bronx neighborhood. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive removal and exclusion services tailored to Morris Heights' unique mix of pre-war apartments and residential homes.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Morris Heights for years, understanding the specific squirrel challenges posed by the area's tree-lined streets and older building infrastructure. Our certified technicians use humane, effective methods with guaranteed results and competitive pricing from $900 to $2,500.
localContext: Morris Heights' proximity to Macombs Dam Park and the tree-canopied residential blocks near University Avenue create ideal squirrel habitats that often lead to home invasions. The neighborhood's distinctive pre-war apartment buildings and attached row houses feature numerous entry points that squirrels exploit, making professional exclusion services essential.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Morris Heights?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Morris Heights typically range from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and required repairs. This includes humane trapping, removal, exclusion work, and sanitation of affected areas.

faqs.question: Why are squirrels common in Morris Heights homes?
faqs.answer: Morris Heights' mature trees, proximity to green spaces like Mullaly Park, and abundance of older buildings with accessible entry points make it particularly attractive to squirrels. Pre-war construction often features gaps in rooflines, vents, and soffits that squirrels easily exploit for nesting.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Morris Heights property?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Morris Heights are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the size of the infestation. We begin with a thorough inspection within 24 hours of your call, followed by immediate trapping and exclusion work to prevent re-entry.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal safe for my Morris Heights apartment building?
faqs.answer: Yes, our squirrel removal methods are completely safe for multi-family buildings common in Morris Heights. We use humane trapping techniques, child and pet-safe materials, and work discreetly to minimize disruption to tenants while ensuring all entry points are permanently sealed.
